name: extraction_relationship_cases
description: Comprehensive 100-case relation-bearing extraction set focused on whether the extraction stage preserves relation signals in free-text facts. Coverage includes named third parties, unnamed relations, inverse phrasing, Chinese and English variants, multi-turn reuse, same-name different-relation scenarios, and relation-bearing negative cases that should stay empty.
